issues.detail: The instructions lack explicit step-by-step guidance for the agent, making them somewhat vague.
The skill does not address error handling or edge cases such as missing data or invalid props.

scenarios.name: Three-series revenue line chart with dollar formatting
scenarios.rationale: Baseline skips ResponsiveContainer, tickFormatter, CartesianGrid and tooltip formatter; treatment uses every documented pattern for a responsive, currency-formatted line chart.

scenarios.name: Area chart with linearGradient fill
scenarios.rationale: Baseline uses fillOpacity instead of the documented <defs><linearGradient> with two <stop> elements referenced via fill=url(#id); treatment follows the exact gradient pattern inside ResponsiveContainer.
